source_jobs.title: Community Manager
source_jobs.description:
Hi! This is the Flipper team.

We are the creators of Flipper Zero https://flipper.net/ — a portable device for tech enthusiasts and engineers. It’s a gadget with an awesome community that brings together millions of people around the world.

We’re building new products:

 - Flipper One https://blog.flipper.net/flipper-one-we-need-your-help/ - a full-featured ARM-based computer running Linux in a compact form factor, powered by the Rockchip RK3576 SoC.

 - BUSY Bar https://busy.bar/ - a smart productivity multi-tool that helps users stay focused and minimize distractions.

We're looking for a Community Manager to build and grow our international community for our products. You'll work closely with moderators and power users, help shape community culture, and become the bridge between our users and the product team.

Responsibilities:

 - Build and improve moderation processes together with our volunteer moderators

 - Develop community guidelines, moderation policies, and internal playbooks

 - Engage with users across Reddit and Discord, keeping discussions healthy and valuable

 - Collect structured product feedback from the community and share actionable insights with the product team

 - Help organize community initiatives and increase engagement across all channels

Requirements:

 - Fluent in both English and Russian

 - Experience managing online communities on platforms such as Reddit or Discord

 - Experience building engagement and working directly with online communities

 - Ability to communicate with empathy and stay calm in difficult situations

 - Genuine interest in technology and consumer products

Nice-to-haves:

 - Familiarity with hardware-focused products

What we offer:

 - Choose your work format: office, hybrid, or fully remote from anywhere in the world

 - You will be provided with all the necessary equipment for a comfortable working environment

 - Benefits such as VHI, corporate sports, foreign language courses, and therapy sessions

 - A five-day workweek with a flexible start of the working day

source_jobs.title: 3D Product Visualiser & Motion Designer
source_jobs.description:
We are the creators of Flipper Zero https://flipper.net/ — a portable device for tech enthusiasts and engineers. It’s a gadget with an awesome community that brings together millions of people around the world

We’re currently working on our new products — BUSY Bar https://busy.app/, a smart device that helps you stay focused and minimise distractions, and Flipper One https://blog.flipper.net/flipper-one-we-need-your-help/.

We’re actively expanding — growing new teams and planning the next generation of devices. That’s why we’re now looking for a 3D Product Visualiser & Motion Designer who will be responsible for creating photorealistic 3D renders, animations and product visuals for our devices across the Flipper and BUSY Bar product lines, supporting our websites, the Kickstarter campaign, and marketing channels.



REQUIREMENTS

 - Strong experience with Physically Based Rendering (PBR), including confident work with materials, textures, and lighting

 - Ability to seamlessly integrate 3D renders into real-world photography (photo compositing)

 - Experience creating animations of objects, cameras, and lighting setups (example: https://www.instagram.com/p/DR42L0hkbdD/)

 - Proficiency in post-processing and visual refinement using Adobe Creative Suite

 - Hands-on experience with at least one of the following tools: Blender (preferred, as our existing pipeline is primarily based on it), Cinema 4D, KeyShot


NICE-TO-HAVE

 - Mesh modeling skills are a strong plus


RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Create high-quality PBR renders of our devices and products

 - Build and assemble product renders within complete 3D environments (walls, desks, and other scene assets)

 - Integrate product renders into real-world photographs

 - Produce raw animations involving products, cameras, and lighting

 - Refine and polish finished visuals using Adobe tools


WHAT WE OFFER

 - London office

 - You will be provided with all the necessary equipment for a comfortable working environment

 - Benefits such as VHI, corporate sports, foreign language courses, and therapy sessions

 - A five-day workweek with a flexible start of the working day

source_jobs.title: Creative Producer
source_jobs.description:
Hi! This is the Flipper team.
We are the creators of Flipper Zero https://flipper.net/ - a portable device for tech enthusiasts and engineers. It's a gadget with an awesome community that brings together millions of people around the world.

We're building new products:

 - Flipper One https://blog.flipper.net/flipper-one-we-need-your-help/ - a full-featured ARM-based computer running Linux in a compact form factor, powered by the Rockchip RK3576 SoC.

 - BUSY Bar https://busy.bar/ - a smart productivity multi-tool that helps users stay focused and minimize distractions.

We're looking for a Creative Producer to run the production of our paid social ads. That includes sourcing and managing external videographers and editors, setting up efficient workflows, and building a sustainable weekly production cycle. You'll also work closely with our Digital Marketing Manager on ideas and creative direction, and with our in-house writers team on scripts and messaging.

Responsibilities:

 - Find external freelance videographers and editors, building a reliable external roster you can call on consistently

 - Establish and maintain a stable weekly production cycle

 - Work with the internal writers team on scripts

 - Collaborate closely with the Paid Social Creative Strategist on generating ad concepts

 - Oversee all filming by external videographers and, when needed, by the internal team

 - Oversee all editing by external editors, reviewing cuts in detail and giving feedback

Requirements:

 - You can work within GMT+2 (±2 hours) to ensure smooth collaboration with the team

 - 3+ years in a creative or content production role, ideally with experience producing paid ad content

 - Deep working knowledge of video production: you can speak with videographers about framing, lighting, and shot composition, as well as with editors about pacing and cuts

 - Proven track record managing freelance videographers and editors end to end, from first contact to final delivery

 - Genuine interest in tech products and content around them

What we offer:

 - Choose your work format: office, hybrid, or fully remote from anywhere in the world

 - You will be provided with all the necessary equipment for a comfortable working environment

 - Benefits such as VHI, corporate sports, foreign language courses, and therapy sessions

 - A five-day workweek with a flexible start of the working day

source_jobs.title: Product Owner | Senior
source_jobs.description:
We are currently building BUSY — a unified ecosystem combining the BUSY Bar https://busy.bar/ smart productivity multi-tool with the cross-platform BUSY App https://busy.app to help users stay focused and fight off notifications, social media, and all the other brainrot.

We’re looking for a Product Owner to own BUSY end-to-end, keeping hardware, mobile & desktop apps, integrations, user journeys, activation, retention, and new features all in sync. You’ll need sharp product judgment, strong prioritization, and leadership skills to transform ideas, feedback, constraints, and opportunities into actionable plans and tangible product progress.


Requirements:

 - 5+ years of experience as a Product Owner, Product Manager, or Product Lead

 - Hands-on product ownership — you make things happen, not just talk about them

 - Comfortable working at the intersection of hardware and software

 - Able to see the product as a whole: device, app, integrations, states, constraints, dependencies

 - Skilled at turning scattered inputs into a clear structure and priorities

 - Writes product requirements clearly and without fluff

 - Experienced collaborating with engineers and designers in a shared context

 - Confident with technical topics: APIs, integrations, device behavior, cross-platform logic

 - Protects the product focus — doesn’t try to fit everything into the roadmap

 - Makes decisions grounded in common sense, user signals, and data, not just intuition

Nice-to-have:

 - Hands-on experience with consumer hardware, companion apps, or connected devices

 - Background in productivity products, focus tools, or behavioral UX

 - Experience with automation, integrations, or developer-facing features

 - Familiarity with community-driven products

 - Experience working on fast-moving products that are still actively evolving

Responsibilities:

 - Own the BUSY product as a unified system, not just a collection of features

 - Define and prioritize the roadmap for BUSY Bar and BUSY App

 - Specify how key scenarios should work: focus mode, timers, distraction blocking, statuses, integrations, and automations

 - Keep hardware, app, and integrations aligned so the product stays cohesive

 - Work with user feedback, community signals, and internal team context

 - Collaborate with design and development to decide which features should be built and which should not

 - Turn ideas and discussions into clear product requirements, user flows, and actionable tasks

 - Monitor onboarding, activation, retention, and repeat usage

 - Participate in launching new features and improving existing ones

 - Align product decisions across design, development, marketing, support, and operations

What we offer:

 - Fully remote from anywhere in the world

 - You will be provided with all the necessary equipment for a comfortable working environment

 - Benefits such as VHI, corporate sports, foreign language courses, and therapy sessions

 - A five-day workweek with a flexible start of the working day

source_jobs.title: Support Manager
source_jobs.description:
Hi! This is the Flipper team.

We are the creators of Flipper Zero https://flipper.net/ - a portable device for tech enthusiasts and engineers. It's a gadget with an awesome community that brings together millions of people around the world.

We're building new products:

 - Flipper One https://blog.flipper.net/flipper-one-we-need-your-help/ - a full-featured ARM-based computer running Linux in a compact form factor, powered by the Rockchip RK3576 SoC.

 - BUSY - a unified ecosystem combining the BUSY Bar https://busy.app/ smart productivity multi-tool with the cross-platform BUSY App https://busy.app/pages/app to help users stay focused and fight off notifications, social media, and all the other brainrot.

We are looking for a Support Manager to join our team. You will be the primary point of contact for our users, helping them resolve technical and logistical issues, investigating incidents, and ensuring that every interaction leaves a positive impression. You will also act as the bridge between our users and the product teams, escalating critical bugs and corner cases.



RESPONSIBILITIES:

 - Handle user inquiries across multiple channels (e-mail, with potential expansion to online chats in the future)

 - Investigate user incidents thoroughly to identify root causes and provide accurate solutions

 - Escalate critical problems, bug reports, and corner cases to the relevant cross-functional teams (development, logistics, etc.)

 - Manage product returns and replacements, ensuring a smooth and transparent process for the user

 - Collect and structure user feedback to help improve our products and documentation

Requirements:

Hard skills:

 - 1.5+ years of experience in Technical Support

 - Experience with ticketing systems (Zendesk is highly preferred)

 - Strong skills in investigating client issues and gathering detailed information for escalation

Soft skills:

 - Strong customer orientation and empathy

 - Stress resistance and the ability to handle negativity constructively

 - Attention to detail

 - Excellent written communication skills

 - Ability to work independently, search for information, and make decisions proactively

Language: Russian (native), English (B2 or higher)

 

Nice-to-haves:

 - Experience in e-commerce (processing requests related to delivery and returns)

 - Basic experience with Jira (creating tickets, commenting, tracking and changing statuses)

What we offer:

 - Choose your work format: office, hybrid, or fully remote from anywhere in the world

 - You will be provided with all the necessary equipment for a comfortable working environment

 - Benefits such as VHI, corporate sports, foreign language courses, and therapy sessions

 - A five-day workweek with a flexible start to the working day

notes: Flipper team, creators of Flipper Zero and BUSY Bar, with a focus on product development and community building.
